title: LUMIÈRE MÉNAGE monochrome beauty brand mark: vectorize the supplied concept + build the full reversible variant system (master SVG, avatar, stacked lockup, one-color/mono-tint knockouts, print PNGs) with a font recommendation, palette recipe, and usage board
one_line_ask: Clean and vectorize LUMIÈRE MÉNAGE's supplied flat monochrome logo concept into an editable SVG master, then assemble the full reversible variant system — black-on-white master, white-on-dark knockout, avatar/PFP crop, stacked lockup, one-color black print PNG, a mono-tint alt, a monochrome palette recipe, a font recommendation, and a usage board — all scalable from avatar to signage.

issues: Monogram mark contains nested/layered LM forms that are slightly complex rather than a single resolved symmetric shape — minor compositional ambiguity between the L and M resolution
Mild compression softness on geometric edges as expected for source file
Near-white background present as intended (#F5F5F3 range) — not a defect
